'''Evil Supreme''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle]]/[[Gladiator droid/Legends|gladiator droid]] that worked at [[Mondo-Mod]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Arena of Doom]]. By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] had become the champion of the Arena. When [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] came to the [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] ring looking for the location of a secret [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] factory that Mondo-Mod had gained access to, Mondo-Mod said he would give her the data, if she agreed to a challenge. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had to beat his three best fighters with out using a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] or any [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers.

After defeating the Arenas' first two fighters, the weary Luminara faced Evil Supreme, the "Droid to End All Droids". Although nearly everyone thought that the giant robot was going to win, Luminara surprised them all when she simply picked up a pebble from the ground and kicked it through Evil Supreme's head. The gladiator droid was immediately incapacitated by the pebble and it is unknown if it was ever repaired afterwards.
